sourcesContent:
<!-- src/views/user/MyProfile/components/ModuleList.vue -->
<template>
  <!-- No changes to template section -->
</template>

<script setup>
// No changes to imports or setup section

// 处理添加按钮点击
const handleAdd = (type) => {
  console.log('【ModuleList】处理添加:', {
    type,
    时间: new Date().toISOString(),
    当前模块类型: type
  })
  
  // 根据不同类型设置不同的初始值
  let initialData = {}
  if (type === 'skill') {
    initialData = {
      name: '',
      level: '',
      description: ''
    }
  } else if (type === 'project') {
    initialData = {
      name: '',
      role: '',           // 添加角色字段
      start_date: '',
      end_date: '',
      is_current: false,
      description: '',
      achievement: ''     // 使用 achievement 替代 link
    }
  }
  
  currentModule.value = { type }
  editFormData.value = initialData
  showEditModal.value = true
}

// No changes to rest of the script section
</script>

<style scoped>
/* No changes to style section */
</style>
